name: Creole Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a medium skillet with cooking spray and place over low heat until hot.
2. Add green pepper and onion; sauté 2 to 3 minutes or until tender.
3. Remove from heat, then add mushrooms and tomato juice.
4. Combine remaining ingredients, stirring to blend.
5. Add the mixture to the skillet and bring to a boil.
6. Boil sauce, stirring constantly, for 1 minute or until thickened and bubbly.
7. Serve hot.
